title: Scalability
description: The system must be able to accommodate millions of students.

title: Accessibility
description: The system must be accessible to individuals with learning disabilities.

title: Usability
description: The system must be user-friendly and easy to navigate.

title: Data Privacy
description: The system must comply with data privacy regulations and protect user data.

title: Security
description: The system must ensure the security and integrity of user data.

title: Performance
description: The system must perform efficiently and effectively.

title: Reliability
description: The system must be reliable and consistent in its performance.

title: Maintainability
description: The system must be easy to maintain and update.
